problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Combining Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
